original_abstract: This research explores the integration of Islamic pedagogical values within the Project for Strengthening the Pancasila Student Profile and Work Culture (P5BK) to refine student character development at SMKN 1 Masbagik. Utilizing a qualitative descriptive approach, data were gathered through semi-structured interviews, field observations, and comprehensive document analysis, subsequently processed using the Miles and Huberman interactive model. The findings reveal that the synergy between P5BK and Islamic education is realized through thematic projects focusing on sustainable lifestyles, employability, and local wisdom. The implementation follows a structured four-stage framework: planning, execution, evaluation, and identifying supportive facilitators. Key advantages of this integrated model include its operational flexibility, strengthened collaboration with the local community and industry, and its ability to provide immersive, real-world experiences that heighten students' social and environmental consciousness. Theoretically, this study reinforces the efficacy of the Independent Curriculum (Kurikulum Merdeka) by demonstrating how value-based frameworks can enhance teacher competence and elevate the overall quality of vocational education.
humanized_abstract: Title of thesis: Character Building of SMKN 1 Masbagik Students through P5BK (Project for Strengthening the Pancasila Student Profile and Work Culture) Model with Islamic Education Values Background of Research According to Dewantara (1948), education is not only an effort to bring students into accordance with society norms, but is a way to foster the noble character of humans in the context of higher values and knowledge. With respect to the curriculum of vocational schools, teachers are assigned a role to look after students? moral progress in educational institutions. SMKN 1 Masbagik does not differ from other schools. The Minister of Education and Culture, Mr. Nusron angel (2017), on the eve of National Education Day, has reiterated the education system must produce three types of human resources who are worthy to build the nation. Therefore, the researchers attempt to combine and connect Islamic education values in SMKN 1 Masbagik students with the Project for Strengthening the Pancasila Student Profile and Work Culture (P5BK). This study employed qualitative descriptive research design. The research data were obtained from teachers and students through a semi-structured interview, class room observation and document analysis, which is then analyzed by using Miles and Huberman interactive model. The result shows that the link between P5BK and Islamic education values are through thematic projects on the theme of sustainable living, which aims to enhance students' competitiveness so that they can work, and through the local wisdom that has always existed. P5BK is a model implemented in four stages, namely: preparation stage, real action stage, evaluation stage and facilitators identification stage. The implementation of this model shows many advantages such as the flexibility in the model implemented by teachers, increased cooperation between the school and community and the companies as well as enhanced students' awareness toward social and environmental issues. The theory of Independent Curriculum (Kurikulum Merdeka) proved to be feasible in terms of embedding value to be the benchmark of teachers' competency and therefore could increase the quality of vocational education.
